Off Calendar Oct-30-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Mark J. Romeo; 415-395-9315; appearing as counsel for plaintiffs Paul D. Busterna, et al.
Chris D. Kuhner; Kornfield, Nyberg, Bendes, Kuhner & Little, P.C.; 510-763-1000; appearing as counsel for Referee, Janina M. Hoskins.
Janina M. Hoskins, Referee, is present.
